cards.name: [CAF] Fix CAFListSection frontend tests (Vitest mock binding)
cards.desc: 6 tests in CAFListSection.test.tsx fail after removing empresaId prop from listCAFs(). Root cause: Vitest factory mock + React Query v5 setQueryData not propagating to component — the no-arg listCAFs() import binding appears to be a different instance than cafsApi.listCAFs in the test. Tests with empty data pass; tests with CAF items (count>0) timeout. Fix: investigate vi.mock factory vs auto-mock behavior with no-arg async functions in Vitest v2.1, or use a different test pattern (e.g. render with pre-populated QueryClient via a wrapper that passes initialData).
checklist: Reproduce isolation: run single failing test to confirm no cross-test contamination
Try auto-mock (no factory) + explicit beforeEach mockResolvedValue
Fix and verify all 8 tests in CAFListSection.test.tsx pass
